basics.name: Anand Bhaskaran
basics.label: Senior Software Engineer | Technical Lead | Startup Mentor | MBA | AI
basics.summary: AI-focused technical leader with over 10 years of experience driving product innovation and developer tools. Proven track record in shipping high-impact features, enhancing developer experiences, and aligning product roadmaps with strategic goals. Successfully led teams to achieve $1.5M+ in revenue and implemented solutions that improved user engagement by 90%.

work.name: Beekeeper AG
work.summary: As a Technical Lead, I drove innovation across scalable systems and AI-powered features, significantly enhancing platform reliability and developer velocity.
highlights: Led architectural design and launch of Employee Referral System (99.99% SLA) — generated $1.5M+ revenue including $500K ARR through agile methodologies and customer-focused iteration
Spearheaded the design and development of Beekeeper's Templating Engine — reduced setup time by 90% and enhanced user engagement, now powers 15% of all platform assets
Engineered robust search interface accommodating 10M+ users — elevated user engagement and accelerated platform adoption rate
Assembled and led high-performing remote engineering teams, fostering an environment for maintainable code and customer-centric solutions
Collaborated with product managers and data engineers in A/B experimentation to derive insightful data for product iterations
Designed and deployed advanced Generative AI systems saving $337K and accelerating go-to-market since Jan 2024
Acting technical hiring manager for AI roles, mentoring junior engineers while owning end-to-end delivery of core modules

work.name: Tenity
work.summary: Mentor and technology evaluation panel member guiding startups on scalability and technical strategy to enhance their innovations.
highlights: Conducted thorough evaluations of emerging technologies for seed-to-VC startups, enabling impactful solutions and growth
Advised multiple startups on technical hiring, AI adoption, and developing scalable solutions aligned with unique goals

work.name: Dronistics
work.summary: Founding engineer for Dronistics, developing an autonomous drone delivery system utilized in over 500 last-mile deliveries.
highlights: Delivered a complete software/cloud stack for autonomous drone delivery, showcased at CES Las Vegas with partnerships like Unilever
Built an end-to-end platform that powered successful operations for enterprise partnerships, achieving a 40% reduction in delivery times
Engineered real-time flight control APIs maintaining a 99.5% safety record, optimizing logistics and operational efficiency

work.name: EPFL — Laboratory of Intelligent Systems (Robogen)
work.summary: Led the engineering of Robogen, an open-source platform for co-evolving robot morphologies and control systems.
highlights: Spearheaded migration of the Robogen platform to AWS, securing research credits and achieving recognition on the AWS Research Blog
Supervised over 20 master’s students in robotics and AI projects, fostering innovation and research in artificial evolution
Contributed to groundbreaking research efforts in robotics, significantly advancing the field's academic and practical applications

_jobApplication.jobDescription:
Supabase is an open-source Firebase alternative that provides all the backend services you need to build a scalable and robust application: Database, Storage, Auth, Edge Functions, Realtime. Our products are used and loved by millions of developers around the world and our mission is to continue to empower developers to create extraordinary products with simplicity and speed.

Supabase is a fully remote company and we work asynchronously across many time zones.

We are looking for an experienced technical product manager with a passion for working on developer tools. In this role, you will be diving into the technical details while also maintaining a 30,000-foot view to drive decisions.

What you’ll work on:
Help product teams with prioritization: each product team should be aware of the top three priorities they need to work on at any given time

Work closely with the customers, Sales, Success, and Support teams to identify key customer problems and address them from a product perspective

Build tooling to triage and distill feedback from various sources, including the dashboard, CLI, support tickets, GitHub, and Twitter

Align the product roadmap with company goals

Partner with product teams on developing and tracking Metrics:

to track the acquisition, activation, and retention of different features

Dive into data to understand common use cases, identify the most and least used features, and pinpoint potential bottlenecks

Work with the Product Marketing team to communicate the value of the features being built and the roadmap to the rest of the team

What you bring:
6+ years of experience as a product manager for a developer tools product, or as a developer with a keen sense of product

Proven track record of working in a fast-paced environment and shipping developer-facing products from ideation to launch

Excellent communication skills, both with engineers and external stakeholders

Customer-obsessed, with a track record of gathering insights and translating them into action

Comfortable diving deep into a wide array of highly technical product. For instance, you might investigate how Realtime handles connection pooling one day and explore the implications of Postgres running in a browser the next

Deep knowledge about how Supabase products work

Alignment with our Product Principles

Developer empathy and a drive to improve developer experience

Product principles: Everything works in isolation, Everything is integrated, Everything is extensible, Everything is portable, Play the long game, Build for developers, Support existing tools
